title: Anniversary date field
excerpt: I’d like to add a date field that shows the anniversary date. I’m trying to setup a Service Provider board to keep track of when contracts have to be renewed. The anniversary date field would apply to every year, rather …

posts.author: acumberbatch (Adrian Cumberbatch)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’d like to add a date field that shows the anniversary date. I’m trying to setup a Service Provider board to keep track of when contracts have to be renewed. The anniversary date field would apply to every year, rather than being a specific date that occurs once.
If there’s already a way to do this please let me know.

posts.author: KatieB (Katie Byrne)
posts.cookedHtml: I too, would like to set this up. Did you manage to work it out?

posts.author: acumberbatch (Adrian Cumberbatch)
posts.cookedHtml: Unfortunately, no, i gave up on this.

posts.author: TheOtherPM (Paul McGregor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Could you setup an automation that does this :

When due date arrives, push the due date by a year.
